title: "Everyone" tagging
excerpt:

posts.author: kmachin (Kelly Machin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please change the order of the “everyone” tagging. Please make them appear in this order: Everyone on project > Everyone on board > Everyone on workspace. This is a natural progression in how many people will be contacted. With “Everyone on board” as the first option, people select it by accident and the message goes to way too many people that do not need to be contacted for that message. Thank you!

What are you trying to achieve

We’re trying to reduce the erroneous selection of “Everyone on board”, because of auto-finishing when someone types “Everyone…” in the updates section.
